title: June 30th, 2021 (2)

        - family

        - professional
            -  #professional
                - i hope you got people who see you lyrics
                    - i hope you got people who see you
                    - through the bullshit
                    - when ya step off the pulpit
                    - away from the cool kids
                    - i hope you got people who could be you
                    - for a day when you don't got a full tank
                    - but something still needs you
                    - we're so thankful it's painful not to be there
                    - i hope you got people you could breathe air with
                    - their wherewithal gives you lift
                    - y'all share it feels fair a weird space you're both at ease in
                    - i hope you got people prepared to lift
                    - when you fall and can't get back up
                    - cuz it's hard being people we all need back up
